title: Mastering Express Routing

title: Building REST API with Middleware

title: Cardio and Endurance Training
description: 45-minute high-intensity interval training (HIIT) session to improve cardiovascular endurance, stamina, and overall metabolic conditioning.

title: Database Integration with Express
description: Connect Express application to a relational database, implement CRUD operations, and structure controllers and services for maintainable backend architecture.

title: Learn TypeScript Basics
description: Understand types, interfaces, generics, and how TypeScript improves code reliability and developer experience in backend development.

title: Upper Body Hypertrophy Workout
description: Focused hypertrophy session targeting chest, shoulders, and triceps with controlled tempo and proper volume management.

title: JWT Authentication Implementation
description: Implement JSON Web Token authentication including token generation, verification middleware, and refresh token strategy.

title: Morning Yoga Routine

title: Designing Clean Architecture
description: Study separation of concerns, dependency inversion, and modular folder structure for scalable backend applications.

title: Lower Body Strength Workout

description: Implement query-based pagination, sorting, and filtering mechanisms for efficient data retrieval in REST APIs.

description: Create centralized error handling middleware and standardized API response format for production-ready applications.

description: Design RBAC system with middleware guards and permission mapping for secure multi-role applications.

description: Create collections, environment variables, and automated test scripts to validate API endpoints effectively.

description: Prepare production build, configure environment variables, and deploy Express application to a cloud platform.
